hero.headline: From grape to health: total biomass valorization
hero.subheadline: We transform what the wine industry discards into bioactive ingredients that improve lives. Mendoza origin. Validated science. Real co-creation.

problem.headline: The wine industry uses the juice. The rest goes to waste.
problem.body: Between 70% and 80% of the biomass generated by the winemaking process is not used in high-value products. Those skins, seeds, and stems contain the most biologically potent compounds of the entire plant. Qualab turns that gap into opportunity.

colorante.name: Natural Grape Colorant
colorante.desc: Stabilized anthocyanins from red grape skins. The red of the grape, ready for industry.

aceite.name: Grape Seed Oil
aceite.desc: Cold-pressed oil, rich in essential fatty acids and natural vitamin E.

polvo.name: Grape Skin Powder
polvo.desc: Dehydrated grape skin, a natural source of polyphenols and dietary fiber.

diferencial.headline: Why Qualab
diferencial.d1_body: Raw material from high-altitude Mendoza vineyards. Complete traceability from field to ingredient.
diferencial.d2_body: Validated evidence in collaboration with UC Davis, Catena Institute and research centers.
diferencial.d3_body: Leo, our artificial intelligence platform, compresses R&D cycles and connects science with market.
diferencial.d4_body: We work with you from hypothesis to product. Real speed, focus and flexibility.

cta_final.headline: Are you a brand looking to differentiate through health, science and origin?
cta_final.body: We work with functional food brands, clean beauty companies and nutraceutical laboratories that want to co-create unique ingredients.

hero.headline: An innovation platform, not just a supplier
hero.body: Qualab was born from the desire to transform a traditional industry like viticulture into a platform for innovation, health and sustainability.

proposito.headline: Transform viticulture into a bio-factory that improves people's quality of life and protects the environment.
proposito.historia_body: Fernando Buscema, founder and CEO of Qualab, felt the need to reconnect his work with his personal life. Returning to his work routine, he noticed the difficulty of explaining why his work — tied to wine — kept him away from home. What he produced couldn't be shared by those he loved most. From that experience came a vision: expand the impact of the wine world so it can improve the lives of all people, including those who don't drink wine.

vision.headline: Upcycle the equivalent of all pomace produced by Argentina and Chile annually.
vision.body: Build the ecosystem that connects vineyards, science, technology and global health and wellness markets.

leo.headline: Leo: our AI to compress R&D cycles
leo.body: Leo is our artificial intelligence platform in development. It processes thousands of scientific publications and patents to identify valorization opportunities, connect compounds with biological effects and guide the development of new ingredients with robust evidence. In development.

hero.headline: Natural actives from viticultural origin
hero.body: Bioactive ingredients obtained from grape biomass, with complete traceability from high-altitude Mendoza vineyards.

colorante.name: Natural Grape Colorant
colorante.headline: The red of the grape, stabilized for industry
colorante.intro: Natural pigment obtained from red grape skins from Mendoza. Rich in anthocyanins, synthetic-free, with traceable origin identity.
colorante.origen_body: Red grape skins from Mendoza varietals (Malbec and other red varieties). Obtained as a noble by-product of the winemaking process.
colorante.compuesto_body: Anthocyanins — the natural pigments responsible for the red-violet color of red grapes. Beyond coloring, they act as antioxidants and exhibit documented bioactive properties.
colorante.why_1: Global clean label trend: consumers reject synthetic colorants
colorante.why_3: Traceable origin and circular sustainability narrative
colorante.why_4: Alternative to carmine and tartrazine in natural formulations

aceite.name: Grape Seed Oil
aceite.headline: Cold-pressed oil, rich in essentials
aceite.intro: Virgin oil extracted from Mendoza grape seeds. Unique lipid profile, high in linoleic acid and natural vitamin E.
aceite.origen_body: Seeds separated from post-winemaking pomace, cold-pressed to preserve their bioactive profile.

polvo.name: Grape Skin Powder
polvo.headline: Natural concentrate of polyphenols and fiber
polvo.intro: Dehydrated and micronized grape skin. Natural source of anthocyanins, resveratrol, dietary fiber and phenolic compounds.
polvo.origen_body: Skins separated in the winemaking process, dehydrated and milled. Low-impact process to preserve active compounds.

form.tipo_1: I'm a brand looking for ingredients
form.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please write to us at informes@qualab.co

footer.tagline: We transform viticultural biomass into ingredients that improve lives.
